steps.title: Read the vertex first
steps.content: This is a graph-matching question, so use the graph's easiest feature: the vertex. The displayed parabola opens upward and has vertex $(0,3)$. The correct equation must have that same vertex.

steps.title: Reject the wrong vertices
steps.content: The other choices shift the vertex left to $x=-1$ or put the vertex at $(0,0)$. None of those match the graph's vertex $(0,3)$.

steps.title: Confirm with the matching graph
steps.content: The matching choice, $f(x)=5x^2+3$, has vertex $(0,3)$. It also gives $f(1)=5(1)^2+3=8$, matching the visible point $(1,8)$ on the graph.

steps.title: Choose the match
steps.content: The matching choice is the only graph with vertex $(0,3)$ and the correct height at $x=1$. Therefore, C is correct.
